description.en: Opens the specified URL in a new window, if and only if the given URL is on the same origin as the calling page. It returns aPromisethat resolves with a reference to aWindowClient.

excerpt.es: Opens the specified URL in a new window, if and only if the given URL is on the same origin as the calling page. It returns aPromisethat resolves with a reference to aWindowClient.
